Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from training.compare import ComparisonExperiment

exp = ComparisonExperiment\(output_dir='experiments/results/quick_test'\)
results = exp.run\(
    n_episodes=200,
    difficulties=[1, 3],
    n_seeds=1,
    eval_interval=100,
    test_set_size=10,
\)
exp.generate_paper_figures\(\)
exp.generate_markdown_report\(\)
print\('DONE'\)
")
Bash(ls -la *.py env/*.py agents/*.py agents/model_based/*.py training/*.py dashboard/*.py)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import ast
with open\('play_game.py', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    ast.parse\(f.read\(\)\)
print\('play_game.py: syntax OK'\)

from play_game import _parse_level, _step, _solve, _any_deadlock, LEVELS, UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT

for i, level in enumerate\(LEVELS\):
    state = _parse_level\(level\)
    sol = _solve\(state, max_states=200000\)
    if sol:
        test = _parse_level\(level\)
        for a in sol:
            _step\(test, a\)
        assert test.solved, f'Level {i+1} solution does not solve!'
        print\(f'  Level {i+1} \\"{level[\\"name\\"]}\\": {len\(sol\)} steps \(declared: {level[\\"optimal\\"]}\) -- VERIFIED'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Level {i+1} \\"{level[\\"name\\"]}\\": no solution found in budget'\)

print\('play_game.py: all levels verified'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from play_game import _parse_level, _step, _solve, LEVELS

for i, level in enumerate\(LEVELS\):
    state = _parse_level\(level\)
    sol = _solve\(state, max_states=300000\)
    if sol:
        test = _parse_level\(level\)
        for a in sol:
            _step\(test, a\)
        assert test.solved
        print\(f'  Level {i+1} \\"{level[\\"name\\"]}\\": BFS={len\(sol\)} steps -- OK'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Level {i+1} \\"{level[\\"name\\"]}\\": NO SOLUTION'\)
")
